question: покажи последние 20 транзакций
gold_sql:
SELECT tx_id, operation_date, amount_kzt, direction, payer_name, receiver_name, purpose_text
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
ORDER BY operation_date DESC
LIMIT 20;

FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE source_bank = 'kaspi'

LIMIT 100;

question: найди транзакции где валюта не KZT
gold_sql:
SELECT tx_id, operation_date, amount_kzt, currency, payer_name, receiver_name, purpose_text

question: найди транзакции где получатель содержит слово Kaspi
gold_sql:
SELECT tx_id, operation_date, amount_kzt, direction, payer_name, receiver_name, purpose_text
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE LOWER(COALESCE(receiver_name,'')) LIKE '%kaspi%'
   OR LOWER(COALESCE(receiver_bank,'')) LIKE '%kaspi%'
ORDER BY operation_date DESC
LIMIT 100;

question: покажи транзакции на сумму больше миллиона тенге
gold_sql:

FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE amount_kzt > 1000000
ORDER BY amount_kzt DESC
LIMIT 100;

question: транзакции за январь 2024
gold_sql:

question: сколько всего транзакций в базе
gold_sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_transactions
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view;

question: сколько транзакций по каждому банку
gold_sql:
SELECT source_bank, COUNT(*) AS tx_count
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
GROUP BY source_bank
ORDER BY tx_count DESC;

question: сколько транзакций по каждой валюте
gold_sql:
SELECT currency, COUNT(*) AS tx_count
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE currency IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY currency
ORDER BY tx_count DESC;

question: общая сумма транзакций в тенге
средняя сумма транзакции в KZT
максимальная и минимальная сумма транзакции
медианная сумма транзакции
сколько транзакций по месяцам за всё время
gold_sql:
SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', operation_date) AS month, COUNT(*) AS tx_count
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE operation_date IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', operation_date)
ORDER BY month ASC;

question: общий оборот по каждому банку
gold_sql:
SELECT source_bank, SUM(amount_kzt) AS total_oborot
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE amount_kzt IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY source_bank
ORDER BY total_oborot DESC;

question: аномально крупные транзакции выше 99 перцентиля
gold_sql:
SELECT tx_id, operation_date, amount_kzt, payer_name, receiver_name, purpose_text
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE amount_kzt > (
    SELECT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.99) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY amount_kzt)
    FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
    WHERE amount_kzt IS NOT NULL
)
ORDER BY amount_kzt DESC
LIMIT 50;

question: все входящие транзакции за апрель 2024
gold_sql:
SELECT tx_id, operation_date, amount_kzt, payer_name, receiver_name, purpose_text
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE operation_date BETWEEN '2024-04-01' AND '2024-04-30'
  AND (direction = 'credit'
    OR operation_type_raw ILIKE '%вх%'
    OR operation_type_raw ILIKE '%кредит%'
    OR amount_credit > 0)
ORDER BY operation_date DESC
LIMIT 100;

question: все исходящие транзакции за апрель 2024
gold_sql:
SELECT tx_id, operation_date, amount_kzt, payer_name, receiver_name, purpose_text
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE operation_date BETWEEN '2024-04-01' AND '2024-04-30'
  AND (direction = 'debit'
    OR direction IS NULL
    OR operation_type_raw ILIKE '%исх%'
    OR operation_type_raw ILIKE '%дебет%')
ORDER BY operation_date DESC
LIMIT 100;

question: топ 10 самых крупных входящих операций
gold_sql:

    OR operation_type_raw ILIKE '%вх%'

question: топ 10 самых крупных исходящих операций
gold_sql:

FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE amount_kzt IS NOT NULL
  AND (direction = 'debit'
    OR direction IS NULL
    OR operation_type_raw ILIKE '%исх%')

question: сумма входящих по каждому клиенту
gold_sql:
SELECT client_name, SUM(amount_kzt) AS total_incoming
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE amount_kzt IS NOT NULL
  AND (direction = 'credit' OR operation_type_raw ILIKE '%вх%')
GROUP BY client_name
ORDER BY total_incoming DESC;

question: сумма исходящих по каждому клиенту
gold_sql:
SELECT client_name, SUM(amount_kzt) AS total_outgoing
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE amount_kzt IS NOT NULL
  AND (direction = 'debit' OR direction IS NULL OR operation_type_raw ILIKE '%исх%')
GROUP BY client_name
ORDER BY total_outgoing DESC;

question: с какого банка больше всего входящих по сумме
gold_sql:
SELECT source_bank, SUM(amount_kzt) AS total_incoming
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE amount_kzt IS NOT NULL
  AND (direction = 'credit' OR operation_type_raw ILIKE '%вх%')
GROUP BY source_bank
ORDER BY total_incoming DESC
LIMIT 1;

question: дни когда сумма исходящих была больше суммы входящих
gold_sql:
SELECT operation_date,
    SUM(CASE WHEN direction='credit' OR operation_type_raw ILIKE '%вх%' THEN COALESCE(amount_kzt,0) ELSE 0 END) AS incoming,
    SUM(CASE WHEN direction='debit' OR direction IS NULL OR operation_type_raw ILIKE '%исх%' THEN COALESCE(amount_kzt,0) ELSE 0 END) AS outgoing
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE operation_date IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY operation_date
HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN direction='debit' OR direction IS NULL OR operation_type_raw ILIKE '%исх%' THEN COALESCE(amount_kzt,0) ELSE 0 END)
     > SUM(CASE WHEN direction='credit' OR operation_type_raw ILIKE '%вх%' THEN COALESCE(amount_kzt,0) ELSE 0 END)
ORDER BY operation_date DESC
LIMIT 50;

question: топ 10 плательщиков по сумме
gold_sql:
SELECT payer_name, SUM(amount_kzt) AS total_sent, COUNT(*) AS tx_count
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE amount_kzt IS NOT NULL AND payer_name IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY payer_name
ORDER BY total_sent DESC
LIMIT 10;

question: топ 10 получателей по сумме
gold_sql:

FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE amount_kzt IS NOT NULL AND receiver_name IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY receiver_name
ORDER BY total_received DESC
LIMIT 10;

question: все транзакции где плательщик САЙБОЛ РУФИНА
gold_sql:

FROM afm.transactions_nl_view

question: найди пары плательщик получатель с более 5 транзакциями
gold_sql:
SELECT payer_name, receiver_name, COUNT(*) AS tx_count, SUM(amount_kzt) AS total_amount
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE payer_name IS NOT NULL AND receiver_name IS NOT NULL AND amount_kzt IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY payer_name, receiver_name
HAVING COUNT(*) > 5
ORDER BY tx_count DESC
LIMIT 50;

question: какой получатель имеет больше всего входящих переводов
gold_sql:
SELECT receiver_name, COUNT(*) AS tx_count, SUM(amount_kzt) AS total
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE receiver_name IS NOT NULL AND amount_kzt IS NOT NULL
  AND (direction = 'credit' OR operation_type_raw ILIKE '%вх%')
GROUP BY receiver_name
ORDER BY total DESC
LIMIT 1;

question: общая сумма по каждому контрагенту за 2024 год
gold_sql:

FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE operation_date BETWEEN '2024-01-01' AND '2024-12-31'

  AND receiver_name IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY receiver_name
ORDER BY total_amount DESC
LIMIT 50;

question: найди все операции снятия наличных

question: покажи все транзакции по IBAN KZ10722C000086031993
gold_sql:
SELECT tx_id, operation_date, amount_kzt, direction, payer_name, receiver_name, purpose_text
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE account_iban = 'KZ10722C000086031993'
   OR payer_account LIKE '%KZ10722C000086031993%'
   OR receiver_account LIKE '%KZ10722C000086031993%'

question: для каждого клиента покажи число выписок и число транзакций
gold_sql:
SELECT client_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT account_iban) AS statement_count,
    COUNT(*) AS tx_count
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE client_name IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY client_name
ORDER BY tx_count DESC;

question: самая ранняя и поздняя дата операции
покажи клиентов у которых несколько счетов
gold_sql:
SELECT client_name, COUNT(DISTINCT account_iban) AS account_count
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE client_name IS NOT NULL AND account_iban IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY client_name
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT account_iban) > 1
ORDER BY account_count DESC;

question: сравни операции физических и юридических лиц
gold_sql:
SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN SUBSTRING(COALESCE(payer_iin_bin,'000000000000'),5,1) IN ('4','5') THEN 'ЮЛ'
        WHEN SUBSTRING(COALESCE(payer_iin_bin,'000000000000'),5,1) = '6' THEN 'ИП'
        WHEN LOWER(COALESCE(payer_name,'')) SIMILAR TO '%(тоо|зао|ооо|ип )%' THEN 'ЮЛ/ИП'
        ELSE 'ФЛ'
    END AS entity_type,
    COUNT(*) AS tx_count,
    SUM(amount_kzt) AS total_amount,
    AVG(amount_kzt) AS avg_amount
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE amount_kzt IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY entity_type
ORDER BY total_amount DESC;

question: общая сумма операций юридических лиц
gold_sql:
SELECT SUM(amount_kzt) AS total_ul
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE amount_kzt IS NOT NULL
  AND (SUBSTRING(COALESCE(payer_iin_bin,'000000000000'),5,1) IN ('4','5','6')
    OR LOWER(COALESCE(payer_name,'')) SIMILAR TO '%(тоо|ао |зао|ооо|ип )%');

question: сколько транзакций от нерезидентов

question: транзакции снятия наличных через банкомат
gold_sql:
SELECT tx_id, operation_date, amount_kzt, payer_name, purpose_text
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE LOWER(COALESCE(purpose_text,'')) LIKE '%банкомат%'
   OR LOWER(COALESCE(purpose_text,'')) LIKE '%наличн%'
   OR LOWER(COALESCE(purpose_text,'')) LIKE '%бан%'
   OR LOWER(COALESCE(operation_type_raw,'')) LIKE '%ch debit%'
ORDER BY amount_kzt DESC
LIMIT 100;

question: операции card to card на сумму больше миллиона
gold_sql:
SELECT tx_id, operation_date, amount_kzt, payer_name, receiver_name, purpose_text
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE amount_kzt > 1000000
  AND (LOWER(COALESCE(purpose_text,'')) LIKE '%card to card%'
    OR LOWER(COALESCE(purpose_text,'')) LIKE '%cald to cald%'
    OR LOWER(COALESCE(raw_note,'')) LIKE '%card to card%')
ORDER BY amount_kzt DESC
LIMIT 100;

question: отправители кто делал больше 50 транзакций
gold_sql:
SELECT payer_name, COUNT(*) AS tx_count, SUM(amount_kzt) AS total_sent
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE payer_name IS NOT NULL AND amount_kzt IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY payer_name
HAVING COUNT(*) > 50
ORDER BY tx_count DESC;

question: один отправитель в один день перевел больше миллиона
gold_sql:
SELECT payer_name, operation_date, SUM(amount_kzt) AS daily_total, COUNT(*) AS tx_count
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE amount_kzt IS NOT NULL AND payer_name IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY payer_name, operation_date
HAVING SUM(amount_kzt) > 1000000
ORDER BY daily_total DESC
LIMIT 50;

question: операции без назначения платежа на сумму больше 500 тысяч
gold_sql:
SELECT tx_id, operation_date, amount_kzt, payer_name, receiver_name
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE amount_kzt > 500000
  AND (purpose_text IS NULL OR TRIM(purpose_text) = '')
ORDER BY amount_kzt DESC
LIMIT 100;

question: найди пары плательщик получатель с более 10 транзакциями
gold_sql:
SELECT payer_name, receiver_name, COUNT(*) AS tx_count, SUM(amount_kzt) AS total_amount
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE payer_name IS NOT NULL AND receiver_name IS NOT NULL AND amount_kzt IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY payer_name, receiver_name
HAVING COUNT(*) > 10
ORDER BY tx_count DESC;

question: переводы от нерезидентов на сумму больше 500 тысяч

question: транзакции где сумма больше среднего по клиенту в 10 раз
gold_sql:
SELECT tx_id, client_name, operation_date, amount_kzt, purpose_text
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view t
WHERE amount_kzt IS NOT NULL
  AND amount_kzt > 10 * (
      SELECT AVG(t2.amount_kzt)
      FROM afm.transactions_nl_view t2
      WHERE t2.client_name = t.client_name AND t2.amount_kzt IS NOT NULL
  )
ORDER BY amount_kzt DESC
LIMIT 50;

question: топ 20 операций по сумме за всё время
gold_sql:
SELECT tx_id, operation_date, amount_kzt, payer_name, receiver_name, purpose_text
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE amount_kzt IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY amount_kzt DESC
LIMIT 20;

question: клиенты у которых одна и та же сумма повторяется больше 5 раз
gold_sql:
SELECT client_name, amount_kzt, COUNT(*) AS repeat_count
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE amount_kzt IS NOT NULL AND client_name IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY client_name, amount_kzt
HAVING COUNT(*) > 5
ORDER BY repeat_count DESC
LIMIT 50;

question: найди транзакции где direction NULL
gold_sql:
SELECT tx_id, operation_date, amount_kzt, operation_type_raw, payer_name, purpose_text
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE direction IS NULL
ORDER BY operation_date DESC
LIMIT 100;

question: найди транзакции где сумма в тенге пустая
gold_sql:
SELECT tx_id, operation_date, currency, payer_name, purpose_text
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE amount_kzt IS NULL
ORDER BY operation_date DESC
LIMIT 100;

question: найди транзакции без назначения платежа
gold_sql:
SELECT tx_id, operation_date, amount_kzt, payer_name, receiver_name
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE purpose_text IS NULL OR TRIM(purpose_text) = ''
ORDER BY operation_date DESC
LIMIT 100;

question: найди транзакции с нулевой суммой
gold_sql:
SELECT tx_id, operation_date, amount_kzt, payer_name, purpose_text
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE amount_kzt = 0
ORDER BY operation_date DESC
LIMIT 100;

question: сколько транзакций у которых нет даты операции
найди выписки где нет даты начала периода
gold_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT client_name, account_iban, source_bank
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE period_from IS NULL AND client_name IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY client_name;

question: найди клиентов у которых закрывающий баланс меньше нуля
gold_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT client_name, account_iban, closing_balance
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE closing_balance < 0
ORDER BY closing_balance ASC;

question: для каждого клиента сравни total credit из выписки с суммой транзакций
gold_sql:
SELECT
    client_name,
    MAX(total_credit) AS stated_credit,
    SUM(CASE WHEN direction = 'credit' OR operation_type_raw ILIKE '%вх%'
             THEN COALESCE(amount_kzt,0) ELSE 0 END) AS tx_credit_sum
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE amount_kzt IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY client_name
ORDER BY stated_credit DESC NULLS LAST;

question: сравни активность клиентов kaspi и halyk
gold_sql:
SELECT source_bank,
    COUNT(DISTINCT client_name) AS client_count,
    COUNT(*) AS tx_count,
    SUM(amount_kzt) AS total_amount,
    AVG(amount_kzt) AS avg_amount
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE amount_kzt IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY source_bank
ORDER BY total_amount DESC;

question: покажи клиентов у которых оборот очень большой но остаток маленький
gold_sql:
SELECT client_name,
    SUM(amount_kzt) AS total_oborot,
    MAX(closing_balance) AS closing_balance
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE amount_kzt IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY client_name
HAVING SUM(amount_kzt) > 1000000 AND MAX(closing_balance) < 10000
ORDER BY total_oborot DESC;

question: для каждого клиента покажи число выписок и число транзакций
gold_sql:
SELECT client_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT account_iban) AS statement_count,
    COUNT(*) AS tx_count,
    SUM(amount_kzt) AS total_amount
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE client_name IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY client_name
ORDER BY tx_count DESC;

question: найди выписки где totals не совпадают с транзакциями
gold_sql:
SELECT client_name, account_iban,
    MAX(total_credit) AS stated_credit,
    SUM(CASE WHEN direction='credit' OR operation_type_raw ILIKE '%вх%'
             THEN COALESCE(amount_kzt,0) ELSE 0 END) AS calc_credit,
    ABS(MAX(total_credit) - SUM(CASE WHEN direction='credit' OR operation_type_raw ILIKE '%вх%'
             THEN COALESCE(amount_kzt,0) ELSE 0 END)) AS diff
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE amount_kzt IS NOT NULL AND total_credit IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY client_name, account_iban
HAVING ABS(MAX(total_credit) - SUM(CASE WHEN direction='credit' OR operation_type_raw ILIKE '%вх%'
             THEN COALESCE(amount_kzt,0) ELSE 0 END)) > 100
ORDER BY diff DESC;

question: сумма операций по месяцам за 2023 год
gold_sql:
SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', operation_date) AS month,
    COUNT(*) AS tx_count,
    SUM(amount_kzt) AS total_amount
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE operation_date BETWEEN '2023-01-01' AND '2023-12-31'
  AND amount_kzt IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', operation_date)
ORDER BY month ASC;

question: сумма операций по месяцам за 2024 год
gold_sql:
SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', operation_date) AS month,
    COUNT(*) AS tx_count,
    SUM(amount_kzt) AS total_amount
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE operation_date BETWEEN '2024-01-01' AND '2024-12-31'
  AND amount_kzt IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', operation_date)
ORDER BY month ASC;

question: по месяцам входящий и исходящий оборот
gold_sql:
SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', operation_date) AS month,
    SUM(CASE WHEN direction='credit' OR operation_type_raw ILIKE '%вх%'
             THEN COALESCE(amount_kzt,0) ELSE 0 END) AS incoming,
    SUM(CASE WHEN direction='debit' OR direction IS NULL OR operation_type_raw ILIKE '%исх%'
             THEN COALESCE(amount_kzt,0) ELSE 0 END) AS outgoing
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE operation_date IS NOT NULL AND amount_kzt IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', operation_date)
ORDER BY month ASC;

question: найди дни с пиковым числом транзакций
gold_sql:
SELECT operation_date, COUNT(*) AS tx_count
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE operation_date IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY operation_date
ORDER BY tx_count DESC
LIMIT 10;

question: сколько транзакций было до 2024 года
динамика среднего чека по кварталам
gold_sql:
SELECT DATE_TRUNC('quarter', operation_date) AS quarter,
    COUNT(*) AS tx_count,
    AVG(amount_kzt) AS avg_amount,
    SUM(amount_kzt) AS total_amount
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE operation_date IS NOT NULL AND amount_kzt IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('quarter', operation_date)
ORDER BY quarter ASC;

question: транзакции похожие на оплату медицинских услуг
gold_sql:
SELECT tx_id, operation_date, amount_kzt, payer_name, receiver_name, purpose_text
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
ORDER BY semantic_embedding <-> :query_embedding
LIMIT 100;

question: переводы между своими счетами
gold_sql:
SELECT tx_id, operation_date, amount_kzt, payer_name, receiver_name, purpose_text
FROM afm.transactions_nl_view
WHERE LOWER(COALESCE(purpose_text,'')) LIKE '%собственн%'
   OR LOWER(COALESCE(purpose_text,'')) LIKE '%перевод%счет%'
ORDER BY semantic_embedding <-> :query_embedding
LIMIT 100;
